items.headline: Inside the Chaotic Iran Talks That Let Trump Claim Victory
items.summary: (Bloomberg) -- It was fight night on the White House lawn. Beneath a great steel canopy nicknamed "the Claw," Justin Gaethje did a backflip off the caged ring in the center of the South Lawn after winning the Ultimate Fighting Championship title card. In the audience, the president, newly 80, had just announced that the Iran war was over, and the Strait of Hormuz was open.Most Read from BloombergRead the 14-Point Draft Memorandum Between the US and IranModi Warns of 'Shortage of Trust' Ahead of

items.headline: Medallia taken over by private credit lender group led by Blackstone
items.summary: A group of private credit lenders led by Blackstone, Apollo and FS KKR Capital Corp. is taking the keys to software company Medallia from previous owner Thoma Bravo in a recapitalization of the business. The transaction will “significantly” reduce Medallia’s outstanding debt, and the new owners are investing $150 million of new capital in the company, according to a June 17 company statement. The transaction also advances Medallia’s existing $500 million commitment to innovation and AI transform
